author: Vince Dioquino
title: Vancouver Moves to Close Bitcoin Reserve Proposal After Legal Review
description: Over a year after Vancouver explored becoming a “Bitcoin-friendly city,” staff say municipal law bars holding Bitcoin in city reserves.
content:
In brief
